log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Centaur — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Centaur — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 15] HIT! 15 damage. Centaur — Unarmored Caster HP: 52/67
→ Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 15] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 15] HIT! 16 damage. Centaur — Unarmored Caster HP: 36/67
--- Centaur — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 36/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:20+4=24 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Centaur — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Centaur — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 15] HIT! 19 damage. Centaur — Unarmored Caster HP: 17/67
→ Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 15] HIT! 20 damage. Centaur — Unarmored Caster HP: -3/67
══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Centaur — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:10+4=14 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.

REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
